title_b: b. Information about the use of controlled substances
title_b_notice: Provide information about device products containing or manufactured from controlled substances in the year prior to the year of registration
checkbox_4: Manufacture of equipment, products containing or made from controlled substances
checkbox_5: Import of equipment, products containing or made from controlled substances
checkbox_6: Owning an air conditioner with a rated cooling capacity of more than 26.5 kW (90,000 BTU/h) and the total rated cooling capacity of more than 586 kW (2,000,000 BTU/h)
checkbox_7: Owning industrial refrigeration equipment with electric capacity of more than 40 kW
checkbox_8: Collection, recycling, reuse and disposal of controlled substances
title_table_1_1: Table 1.1: Information about the use of controlled substances (for organizations that produce, import, and export controlled substances)
des_table_1_1: (*) Provide information about the production, import and export of controlled substances of the last 3 years before the year of registration
title_table_1_2: Table 1.2: Information about the use of controlled substances (for organizations that produce, import equipment containing controlled substances)
des_table_1_2: (*) Provide information about products, equipment containing or manufactured from controlled substances of the year preceding the year of registration
table_1.2_substance_name: Name of controlled substance containing or used to manufacture product/equipment
table_1.2_quantity_2: Quantity of substance contained in 01 product unit
table_1.2_content_1: Manufacturing equipment, products containing or manufactured from controlled substances
table_1.2_content_2: Import of equipment, products containing or manufactured from controlled substances
title_table_1_3: Table 1.3: Information about the use of controlled substances (for organizations possessing equipment containing controlled substances)
des_table_1_3: (*) Provide information on controlled substance-containing equipment owned by the organization in the year preceding the year of registration
table_1.3_title_header_1: Information about equipment containing controlled substances
table_1.3_title_header_2: Information about the new injection of controlled substance to equipment of the year
table_1.3_refills_equipment: Frequency of new controlled substance refills in equipment (times/ year)
table_1.3_amount_equipment: Amount of substance loaded into the equipment/time
table_1.3_content_1: Air conditioners with a rated cooling capacity of more than 26.5 kW (90,000 BTU/h) and with the total rated cooling capacity of more than 586 kW (2,000,000 BTU/h)
table_1.3_content_2: Industrial refrigeration equipment with electrical capacity of more than 40 kW
title_table_1_4: Table 1.4: Information about the use of controlled substances (for organizations that collect, recycle, reuse and dispose of controlled substances)
des1_table_1_4: (*) Within the scope of the Decree, the disposal of controlled substances is the process of using technological and technical solutions to dispose of controlled substances without causing negative impacts on the environment and human health.
des2_table_1_4: (*) Provide information about substances which have been collected, reused, recycled and treated in the year preceding the year of registration.
table_1.4_content: Information about controlled substances collected, reused, recycled, disposed of in the year
table_1.4_content_2: Reuse of controlled substances after collection
table_1.4_content_3: Recycling of controlled substances after collection
checkbox1_529: Proposing the adjustment,supplementation of production quota allocation
checkbox2_529: Proposing the adjustment, supplementation of import quota allocation
title_table_529: Table: Information about the request for adjustment, supplementation of quota for production, import of controlled substances
table_529_total_2: Total quota for adjustment and supplementation (ton of CO2eq)
table_529_DeIncrease: Increase/decrease between the adjusted volume and the allocated volume (ton of CO2eq)
table_529_reason: Reason for requesting adjustment or supplementation
table_529_content_1: Quota for the production of controlled substances
table_529_content_2: Quota for the import of controlled substances
